scripts.//dev:mastra: The 'git checkout 1483557 -- mastra/.workspace' resets the workspace to a known-good baseline commit on every dev start. This is intentional: it prevents agent-generated code from accumulating across sessions and ensures a clean slate each time. If you need to keep workspace changes between runs, remove that prefix. Commit 1483557 is the empty Remotion scaffold that the Implementor writes into.
scripts.dev:mastra: git checkout 1483557 -- mastra/.workspace && cd mastra && bun --bun --env-file=../.env run dev
